CustomField.formula: CASE(Text(leaseworks__Transaction_Type_PL__c) ,'Invoice', IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Invoice__c),null, leaseworks__Invoice__r.Name) ,'Payable', IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payable__c),null, leaseworks__Payable__r.Name) ,'Letter Of Credit', IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Letter_Of_Credit__c),null, leaseworks__Letter_Of_Credit__r.Name) ,'Payment', IF(ISBLANK( leaseworks__Payments_Credits__c ),null, leaseworks__Payments_Credits__r.Name) ,'Offset', IF(ISBLANK( leaseworks__Payments_Credits__c ),null, leaseworks__Payments_Credits__r.Name) ,'Payout', IF(ISBLANK( leaseworks__Payouts__c ), null, leaseworks__Payouts__r.Name) ,'LoC DrawDown', IF(ISBLANK( leaseworks__LOC_Drawdown_rec__c ),null,leaseworks__LOC_Drawdown_rec__r.Name) ,null)
CustomField.label: _Name F
